gold.title: Feedback
gold.reason: Full-featured feedback widget (125 downloads) with inline/default modes, Material-style design system, click-outside handling, and rich interactive states — production-ready for SaaS contact forms and NPS flows.

gold.title: Textarea With Floating Label
gold.reason: CSS-only animated floating label using modern :placeholder-shown and group-focus-within selectors — polished UX pattern seen on top-tier marketing and SaaS login/contact pages with zero JS overhead.

gold.title: Textarea
gold.reason: CVA-powered multi-variant textarea with full aria-invalid support, ring/shadow focus states, readonly styling, and size variants — a solid design-system-grade primitive that elevates any form.

silver.title: Textarea With Characters Left
silver.reason: Functional character counter with color-feedback at limit (teal highlight) — a common and useful UX pattern for bio/comment fields on business sites.

silver.title: Feedback Textarea
silver.reason: Live validation with aria-invalid and contextual success/error messages — good controlled-input pattern but limited in visual distinction.

silver.title: Textarea With Icon
silver.reason: Icon-prefixed textarea with peer-based positioning — a recognizable UI pattern useful for address/message fields, though straightforward in implementation.

silver.title: Textarea
silver.reason: Multi-size variant textarea with integrated error state via a separate Error component (21 downloads) — well-structured but more of a utility primitive than a showcase component.

silver.title: Auto Growing Textarea
silver.reason: Auto-growing via CSS field-sizing-content with clamped max-height — useful behaviour for comment/chat inputs, though minimal visual treatment.

bronze.title: Text Area
bronze.reason: Bare wrapper that renders a single shadcn Textarea with a placeholder — no added functionality, logic, or styling beyond the primitive itself.

bronze.title: Required Textarea
bronze.reason: Adds only a red asterisk required indicator to a label — too minimal to add meaningful value; better handled inline in any form component.
